name: should generate a tackle columns query
description: Test case for should generate a tackle columns query
expected_query: with "tab190a3e975735b3a466eed732bf27e7" as materialized (select pid, SUM(CASE WHEN pid_column = 'solo_tackle_1_pid' THEN 1 WHEN pid_column = 'solo_tackle_2_pid' THEN 1 WHEN pid_column = 'solo_tackle_3_pid' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS solo_tackles_from_plays from (select solo_tackle_1_pid as pid, 'solo_tackle_1_pid' as pid_column, play_type, seas_type, year from "nfl_plays" where "solo_tackle_1_pid" is not null union all select solo_tackle_2_pid as pid, 'solo_tackle_2_pid' as pid_column, play_type, seas_type, year from "nfl_plays" where "solo_tackle_2_pid" is not null union all select solo_tackle_3_pid as pid, 'solo_tackle_3_pid' as pid_column, play_type, seas_type, year from "nfl_plays" where "solo_tackle_3_pid" is not null) as "defensive_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "defensive_plays"."nfl_week_id" in ('2023_PRE_WEEK_1', '2023_PRE_WEEK_2', '2023_PRE_WEEK_3', '2023_PRE_WEEK_4', '2023_REG_WEEK_1', '2023_REG_WEEK_2', '2023_REG_WEEK_3', '2023_REG_WEEK_4', '2023_REG_WEEK_5', '2023_REG_WEEK_6', '2023_REG_WEEK_7', '2023_REG_WEEK_8', '2023_REG_WEEK_9', '2023_REG_WEEK_10', '2023_REG_WEEK_11', '2023_REG_WEEK_12', '2023_REG_WEEK_13', '2023_REG_WEEK_14', '2023_REG_WEEK_15', '2023_REG_WEEK_16', '2023_REG_WEEK_17', '2023_REG_WEEK_18', '2023_REG_WEEK_19', '2023_REG_WEEK_20', '2023_REG_WEEK_21', '2023_POST_WEEK_1', '2023_POST_WEEK_2', '2023_POST_WEEK_3', '2023_POST_WEEK_4') and "defensive_plays"."year" in (2023) group by "pid") select "player"."pid", "tab190a3e975735b3a466eed732bf27e7"."solo_tackles_from_plays" AS "solo_tackles_from_plays_0", "player"."pos" from "player" left join "tab190a3e975735b3a466eed732bf27e7" on "tab190a3e975735b3a466eed732bf27e7"."pid" = "player"."pid" group by "tab190a3e975735b3a466eed732bf27e7"."solo_tackles_from_plays", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 2 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
